{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dreadgod weapon
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dreadgod]] weapons are powerful armaments created by [[Lindon]] that possess significant metaphysical weight and spiritual presence. These tools can be used to rival the strength of [[Monarchs]], provided the wielder possesses sufficient authority and parts of a [[Herald]]'s body. [[Lindon]] has developed several such items, including swords crafted from the [[Weeping Dragon]] and a two-headed hammer named [[Genesis]] that grows more powerful with each new weapon produced. These weapons are capable of reacting to immediate threats, manifesting effects such as crackling lightning and heightened perception. While some individuals desire them out of greed, they are also associated with the immense suffering and destruction caused by the [[Dreadgods]] themselves.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Capable of launching volleys of arrows, these weapons are one of only two types on [[Cradle]] that can rival [[Markuth]]'s [[sword]]. While a person possessing a [[Herald]]'s body and the beginnings of authority can wield them, [[Lindon]] eventually comes to possess two such weapons. One of these is a blue, scale-covered bow that [[Lindon]] presents to [[Larian]], which carries the spiritual weight of a [[Dreadgod]] weapon. These weapons are also noted for their ability to react when sensing threats.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Dreadgod weapon]] is capable of launching volleys of arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] now has two [[Dreadgod]] weapons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A person with a [[Herald]]'s body and beginnings of authority can use a [[Dreadgod weapon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has [[Dreadgod]] weapons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] presents [[Larian]] with a blue, scale-covered bow that has the spiritual weight of a [[Dreadgod weapon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Weapons made from the [[Dreadgods]] are one of two types of weapons on [[Cradle]] that can rival [[Markuth]]'s [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Dreadgod]] weapons react to threats.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“We now have two Dreadgod weapons,” Lindon said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
